description:
The quiz assesses practical CSS knowledge, testing familiarity with modern styling techniques, syntax, and best practices. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, presented in an engaging, conversational tone that encourages self‑assessment. The format is multiple‑choice, aiming to gauge confidence in adding CSS expertise to a résumé.
Topics: Modern CSS features, Selectors and specificity, Layout methods (Flexbox, Grid), Responsive design, CSS preprocessors and tooling
Audience: Web developers and designers looking to validate and showcase their CSS skills, especially those considering adding CSS to their professional profiles.
